site.description: Remaku is a free, open-source visual macro tool for Windows. Automate any desktop app with image recognition, keyboard and mouse actions

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

metadata.title: Download
metadata.description: Download the latest stable version of Remaku for Windows, or get an older release from the version archive.

hero.title: Get Remaku for Windows.
hero.description: Install the latest stable build, or pick an older version if you need to roll back.

fallback.title: Release details are temporarily unavailable.
fallback.description: The download button still points to GitHub's latest installer. Older versions will reappear after the release list can be loaded.

wheelspinCalculator.title: CR Calculator — 86,000 CR per 22B
wheelspinCalculator.label: Your available CR:
wheelspinCalculator.warning: Warning: You need at least {cost} CR for the default {count}-car setup.

hero.h1: Automate any game or desktop app — visually, without writing a single line of code.

properties.title: Wait for Crafting Ready
properties.notePlaceholder: Add a note for this step

intro.lead: Farming resources, crafting items, filling spreadsheets — stop doing the same clicks over and over.
intro.emphasis: remaku watches your screen, so you don't have to.

features.title: Macros that survive resolution changes, window moves, and UI updates.

visualEditor.title: Visual editor
visualEditor.description: Build macros by arranging steps in a tree. Drag, drop, reorder — no scripts, no code, no guesswork.

imageRecognition.title: Image recognition
imageRecognition.description: Click what you see, not where you guess. remaku matches screen regions in real time so your macros keep working even when things move.

macroRecorder.title: Macro recorder
macroRecorder.description: Just press record and play — remaku captures every keystroke, click, and image match in real time. No manual step entry needed.

workflow.title: Three steps to your first macro.

steps.0: Screenshot the button, icon, or text you want remaku to watch for.
steps.1: Add actions — clicks, keypresses, waits — in a visual step tree.
steps.2: Hit run. Repeat as many times as you need.
